# Agenttic

> Agent verification. Everyone else reports what passed; we report what was never
> tested. A pass rate describes the cases somebody thought to write. We measure the
> space an agent was actually put through, hold it to its properties on every run,
> prove what can be proven, and lead with what is still unexercised.

Agenttic runs inside your environment. Your agent, prompts and traces stay where
they already are; the only calls that leave are the ones your own model provider
already receives, under your own keys. Air-gapped operation is supported.

## What we cover that other evaluations structurally cannot

- **What was never exercised.** Coverage of the situation space, not a score over
  a fixed suite — and an explicit refusal to treat an untested corner as a pass.
- **Properties, watched throughout.** Behaviour held to its rules across the whole
  run, including the runs that scored perfectly.
- **Proof where proof is possible.** Where a question about the system is
  decidable, it is decided for every path rather than sampled — with the boundary
  of that claim stated in the same breath.
- **The supply chain, not just the agent.** The tools, servers and memory an agent
  depends on are tested as subjects in their own right.
- **A test built for your agent.** A suite fitted to what the agent actually does,
  and rejected unless it can distinguish a good agent from a bad one.
- **Evidence with an expiry date.** Signed, scoped, revocable, bound to the exact
  version tested, and explicit about what it did not measure.

## What it is not

Not a leaderboard. Not a dashboard. Not a scoring website. The output is not a
number to feel good about — it is a statement of what was verified, what was not,
and what nothing has looked at yet.

## Access

Agenttic is delivered as an engagement rather than a download. We scope the agent,
stand the verification up against it, and hand back evidence a risk function can
read. Availability is limited while we work with a small number of teams.

## Links

- Methodology: https://agenttic.io/methodology
- Request a briefing: https://agenttic.io/#access
- System status: https://agenttic.io/status
- Verify a certificate: https://agenttic.io/certified
